translations.en: a voluptuous woman dressed in dark blue velvet over white cloth.
translations.zh: 身著白布外罩深藍絲絨的豐盈女子。

translations.en: "Have you nothing better to do?" she asks pointedly. "Please excuse us."
translations.zh: 「難道你沒有更好的事可做嗎？」她尖銳地問道。「請讓我們清靜。」

translations.en: "Hello there, stranger. Can I help you?"
translations.zh: 「你好，陌生人。有什麼能幫你的？」

translations.en: "Hello, $G."
"I'm Sylaina @Moorehead."
translations.zh: 「我是希拉依娜·@Moorehead（穆爾）希德。」

translations.en: "When I need some money for food and such, I work as a @seamstress."
translations.zh: 「需要買食物之類的東西時，我就做@seamstress（裁縫）師的活計。」

translations.en: "Most of the time, however, I live off the @seashore."
translations.zh: 「不過大部分時間，我靠著@seashore（海邊）生活。」

translations.en: "Yes. I used to make such fine clothes for my @Nathaniel..."
translations.zh: 「是的。我以前為我的@Nathaniel（納撒）尼爾縫製那麼漂亮的衣裳……」

translations.en: "Though he was not a bad husband, I'll always remember him as something of a scoundrel."
translations.zh: 「雖然他稱不上壞丈夫，但我永遠記得他是個有點不老實的人。」

translations.en: She smiles and her lovely eyes sparkle with memories.
translations.zh: 她微笑，美麗的眼眸閃爍著往日的記憶。

translations.en: "They say he went down in a storm. He was a @pirate."
translations.zh: 「據說他在一場風暴中沉沒。他是個@pirate（海盜）。」

translations.en: "I'm a @widow now. I live in a cottage on the beach."
translations.zh: 「我現在是個@widow（寡婦）。住在海邊的小屋裡。」

translations.en: "There's always a bit of fish or gull's eggs to eat, with lobster once in a while."
translations.zh: 「總有幾條魚或幾枚海鷗蛋可吃，偶爾還有龍蝦。」

translations.en: "I'm as carefree as a @gypsy."
translations.zh: 「我像@gypsy（吉普）賽人一樣無憂無慮。」

translations.en: "My husband left me a little money, to support myself for a time, but I still like to sew fine clothing."
translations.zh: 「我丈夫留下了一點錢供我維持一段時間，但我仍喜歡縫製漂亮的衣裳。」

translations.en: "There are few things as relaxing as embroidering and sitting by the ocean, listening to the surf."
translations.zh: 「沒什麼比刺繡、坐在海邊聆聽浪聲更令人放鬆的了。」

translations.en: "They travel the road between Britain and Trinsic."
translations.zh: 「他們往返於不列顛與崔西克之間的道路。」

translations.en: "Normally I like them. They're a merry lot."
translations.zh: 「通常我喜歡他們。他們是一群歡快的人。」

translations.en: "But one time a group of gypsies @stole my prized @locket!"
translations.zh: 「但有一次一群吉普賽人@stole（偷走）了我珍愛的@locket（墜飾）！」

translations.en: "My husband left me a gold locket."
translations.zh: 「我丈夫留給我一個金墜飾。」

translations.en: "It contained a piece of an old ship's chart. He said that chart would make me rich."
translations.zh: 「裡面裝著一張舊航海圖的碎片。他說那張圖會讓我發財。」

translations.en: "I didn't really care about the chart. But the locket..."
translations.zh: 「我其實不在乎那張圖。但那個墜飾……」

translations.en: "That locket was all I had to remember @Nathaniel by."
translations.zh: 「那個墜飾是我用來記念@Nathaniel（納撒）尼爾的唯一物品。」

translations.en: She sighs and looks away for a moment.
translations.zh: 她嘆口氣，片刻間望向別處。

translations.en: "My husband left me a gold locket wrapped in a piece of an old ship's chart. Maybe that's what you seek."
translations.zh: 「我丈夫留給我一個包在舊航海圖碎片中的金墜飾。也許那正是你在找的。」

translations.en: "I don't have the locket or the map anymore. The gypsies came by one day and @stole them."
translations.zh: 「我不再有那個墜飾或地圖了。有一天吉普賽人來@stole（偷走）了它們。」

translations.en: "Yes--some gypsies are trustworthy, but others are scoundrels!"
translations.zh: 「是的——有些吉普賽人值得信任，但另一些是惡棍！」

translations.en: "Bye-bye."
translations.zh: 「再見。」

translations.en: "Sorry, I cannot help you with that."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，那方面我幫不上忙。」

translator_notes: 希拉依娜是海邊寡婦裁縫師，丈夫納撒尼爾是海盜，已溺斃。金墜飾（含航海圖碎片）被吉普賽人偷走，是重要線索。
